title: Lock-free SPSC vs mutex queue: end-to-end tail latency
notes: Producer pinned to core 4, consumer to core 5 (both CCX1 on Zen 2 3800X). Same-CCX only — cross-CCX deferred. Latency definition: rdtscp immediately before push → rdtscp immediately after pop returns true, both outside synchronisation primitive. 5 × 1M items per run; histograms merged. Paced mode: 1 MHz offered load. Sweep: 8 log-spaced steps 100 kHz→25 MHz.
